title: neotinea corsica
intro: Neotinea corsica, also known as the Corsican toothed orchid, is a rare, terrestrial orchid species native to the island of Corsica. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Neotinea corsica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Neotinea corsica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
